//: Copy the `env` block into ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.json in a project).
//1: Claude Code reads these ONCE at process start, so set them before launching `claude`.
//2: Point CC at the local Permafrost proxy; the proxy forwards to DeepSeek's Anthropic endpoint.

env.//3: CRITICAL: a non-first-party base URL disables MCP tool search by default, which makes CC
env.//4: stop deferring tools and re-inline the full tool set every turn — a giant prefix-cache buster.
env.//5: Permafrost forwards tool_reference blocks, so keep tool search on:
env.//6: Avoid model-name churn. DeepSeek maps claude-sonnet*/haiku* -> deepseek-v4-flash, claude-opus* -> deepseek-v4-pro.
env.//7: Quieter, more deterministic traffic = fewer off-path requests that never hit the cache.
